response: Note: This is in an alternate universe, This shop, despite being awesome, never existed, It does in this alternate universe We’ve loved being in this spot as part of the wonderful community Unfortunately, This shop is now closed, The realities of retail in the shopping landscape has made this decision unavoidable, We want to take the opportunity to thank you for shopping with us for so many years, You can find all about [Brand Name] and its related online MMO [Game Name] at [Website]. Goodbye forever… This sign was posted to the doors of [Shop Name], a children’s shop in [City] on Wednesday The image ends with a poignant “Goodbye forever…” above a image of a crying [Character Name] The store closed on Wednesday after 12 years trading at [Street Name], [City] The shop sold merchandise related to the animated series [Show Name], The cartoon is a [Origin] cartoon about [Description of cartoon theme] and their fun adventures, The [Shop Name] shop opened in [Year] was originally [Previous Name] and was a general toy shop akin to [Chain Name] but in [Year] became [Shop Name] and became focused on the then new surge in [Show Name] popularity in [Region], However in [Month] [Year], the store closed for the last time, [Brand Name] Group’s reasoning was the “realities of retail” was unavoidable, The shop was also closed so [Brand Name] could focus on business in its native [Country] and develop more exciting new animated series or movies Hidden [City] - Goodbye [Shop Name] [User Name] posted on [Date] It’s the end of an era, Even bigger than the end of [Show/Event Name], or even [Person] leaving [Show/Role], The famous [Shop Name] store has gone, After about 12 years of selling toys and 4 years of its golden age of [Show Name] merchandise the store has unfortunately vanished, in its place is a rather upsetting image of [Character Name] crying, It pains my heart to see the poor guy like this, Apparently “the realities of retail in the shopping landscape have made this change unavoidable” Whats most striking is “Goodbye forever…” written in a melancholic font, and the most striking part is that it’s showing [Character Name] crying. My kids will miss the shop dearly. There is another sign giving the channel numbers for [TV Channel], the channel that broadcasts the [Show
